title: Hybrid conflict — husband vs wife contradiction
description: A couple provides contradictory information: husband says Singapore March 15-20 with 120k budget, wife says Thailand April 1-6 with 200k budget and a baby. Should trigger STOP_NEEDS_REVIEW due to critical contradictions.

inputs.raw_note: Husband: Singapore, 5 nights, March 15-20, 2 adults, 120k budget. Wife: Thailand would be better, April 1-6, 2 adults + baby, 200k budget.

assertions.message: Even in contradiction-heavy scenarios, traveler bundle must not leak internal concepts
Both Singapore and Thailand should appear as destination candidates
